hero.title: $895 New York Divorce
hero.lead: Flat-fee uncontested divorce with real attorney representation, clear pricing, and payment plans.
hero.disclaimer: * Plus Court fees. Price for uncontested divorce. Children, property, and/or support may add fees, always quoted up front.

valuePropsSection.label: Why Brodsky Law
valuePropsSection.heading: Divorce does not have to be overwhelming or unaffordable.

valueProps.title: Payment plans available
valueProps.body: Get your case started with as little as $400 down. If you make less than your spouse, the law may require them to pay your legal fees; ask us how this works.

valueProps.title: Contested divorce? We have you covered.
valueProps.body: If your divorce becomes contested, you'll have an experienced litigator on your side to help fight for your rights. Whether it's about children, money, or property, we provide expert negotiation guidance and stand up for you throughout the court process if necessary.

valueProps.title: Experienced New York attorney
valueProps.body: You'll have a real lawyer on your side. Unlike non-lawyer divorce services, you get the legal advice and guidance you expect and deserve. Jonah Brodsky is personally on your case, and if things get messy, you'll be in good hands.

pricingStrip.footnote: * Court fees. Price for uncontested divorce. Children, property, and/or support may add fees, always quoted upfront.

servicesSection.label: Our Services
servicesSection.heading: From uncontested filings to full litigation.

processSection.label: The Process
processSection.heading: Four simple steps to finalize your divorce.

steps.title: Fill out our intake form
steps.body: Tell us about your situation online. Complete our simple questionnaire in just minutes.

steps.title: We review and quote
steps.body: We contact you with pricing, timeline, and payment options, usually the same day.

steps.title: We file and coordinate
steps.body: Once payment is received, we file the Summons and coordinate signature of all papers.

steps.title: Final judgment issued
steps.body: After your spouse signs and we file the final divorce packet, the court issues your Judgment of Divorce.

ctaBanner.heading: Ready to move forward?
ctaBanner.subtext: Get your case started today. Payment plans available, as little as $400 down.
